productDisplayName: Red Tape Men's Brown Casual Shoe
description: Take semi-formal dressing to the next level with these slip-on leather shoes from red tape. With comfort and style rolled into one, these shoes work great for people who love to take off and wear their shoes with ease. Team this with jeans or cargoes and t-shirts for that smart look.Upper Full grain leather upper for maximum durability, breathability and style Slip-on system for easy wear and removal Rugged stitch detailing to enhance shoe life and for style Complete wrap-around foxing in leather for enhanced shoe life Midsole PU midsole for lightweight comfort and impact protection Fabric inner lining for maximum breathability Padded fabric footbed for all-day comfort Brand badge on heel for style Outsole Durable rubber outsole ergonomically designed to offer maximum comfort Horizontally and vertically grooved for absolute grip and traction on various surfaces Shoe careUse a dry, clean cloth to remove dustUse a branded leather conditioner and brush to restore shoe shineDo not store in direct sunlight
